description: Clickable button that replays existing commands on click. Accepts variable references to commands, a display label, execution mode, and animation duration. Defaults to parallel for multiple commands, sequence for one.
utility: Create a clickable button that replays commands on click

arguments.name: commandVars
arguments.description: One or more variable references to existing commands to replay

arguments.name: display
arguments.description: Button text. Second string shown while playing. Defaults to 'Play'

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Execution mode. Defaults to parallel for multiple commands, sequence for one

alternates.syntax: playaction(at(3, 4), A, B, C, display("Play"), type(parallel))
playaction(at(3, 4), A, B, C, display("Play"), type(sequence))

alternates.description: Button shows different text while playing

examples.scenario: Play button for LCM ladder method
examples.expression:
ladderlcm_1 = ladderlcm(at(9.2, 19.5), view(13.9, 13.3), a, b)
playaction(at(5.4, 35.8), ladderlcm_1, display("Play"), fs(26))

examples.scenario: Button to replay a sequence of shapes
examples.expression: playaction(at(3, 4), A, B, C, display("Play"), type(sequence))

examples.scenario: Button with dual labels and duration
